backgroundSync.description: Keep a previously-paired BLE device connected while Safari is backgrounded. No iOS notification is shown — the GATT link is simply maintained by the WebBLE companion app so the web page sees a live connection when the user returns. Lives under window.webbleIOS.backgroundSync.requestBackgroundConnection({ deviceId }).

notifications.description: Deliver an iOS Lock Screen / Dynamic Island notification when a GATT characteristic value changes in the background. Template title/body/url support placeholders like {{deviceName}}, {{value.utf8}}, {{value.int16be}}, {{timestamp}}. Condition gates delivery via decoder + operator + threshold. Cooldown throttles OS notification rate (minimum 5 s).

liveActivity.description: Live Activities (Lock Screen / Dynamic Island) are managed automatically by the WebBLE companion app in IPC-relay mode — they reflect active background-sync registrations (keep-alive connections, characteristic alerts, beacon scans). There is no direct JS opt-in or opt-out today; the page registers background-sync intents and ActivityKit state follows. Standalone mode does not expose Live Activities.

beacons.description: Fire an iOS notification when a BLE advertisement matching registered service-UUID filters is seen while Safari is backgrounded. iOS hardware-filters on service UUIDs; namePrefix is applied in software. Delivery is optimized for catch-up rather than guaranteed real-time while backgrounded. cooldownSeconds dedups notifications per registration.

peripheral.description: Turn the iPhone into a GATT peripheral advertising a custom service. Scanning centrals (other phones, laptops, sensor tags) discover and connect to it like any dedicated device. No other browser exposes GATT-server mode. Access via window.webbleIOS.peripheral — addService(), startAdvertising(), stopAdvertising(), and events onwriterequest / onsubscriptionchange / onconnectionstatechange.

whiteLabel.description: The WebBLE Safari Web Extension and companion app can be re-skinned and shipped under a hardware manufacturer's own App Store identity. This is a commercial arrangement covering bundle identifiers, marketing metadata, App Store Connect ownership, and IPC-relay signing — not a runtime JS API. Contact via the ioswebble.com 'Talk to us' form; no public pricing page exists by design.
